sessionStart.powershell: $s = "$env:USERPROFILE\.agent-worktrees\bin\bootstrap-check.ps1"; if (Test-Path $s) { $p = Get-Command pwsh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($p) { & $p.Source -NoProfile -File $s } else { powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $s } }

$s = "$env:USERPROFILE\.agent-worktrees\bin\project-hooks.ps1"; if (Test-Path $s) { $p = Get-Command pwsh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($p) { & $p.Source -NoProfile -File $s } else { powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $s } }
